name: geoflow
title: GEOFlow
job_to_be_done: Develop or operate GEOFlow across Laravel backend/admin/API/CLI, the default site, themes, leads, and GeoFlow Agent channel sites. Use for code changes, running-system operations, frontend or template edits, channel capability sync, legacy PHP migration, or retired yao-geoflow-cli, yao-geoflow-design, and yao-geoflow-template IDs. Discover real routes first. Excludes unrelated work, database shortcuts, invented routes, auth bypass, secret exposure, raw copying, and unapproved live or destructive actions.

trigger_surface.description: Develop or operate GEOFlow across Laravel backend/admin/API/CLI, the default site, themes, leads, and GeoFlow Agent channel sites. Use for code changes, running-system operations, frontend or template edits, channel capability sync, legacy PHP migration, or retired yao-geoflow-cli, yao-geoflow-design, and yao-geoflow-template IDs. Discover real routes first. Excludes unrelated work, database shortcuts, invented routes, auth bypass, secret exposure, raw copying, and unapproved live or destructive actions.
should_trigger: 给 GEOFlow 后台新增一个 AI 来源管理模块，包含迁移、模型、控制器、页面和测试。
修改 GEOFlow API v1，让任务接口支持新的发布策略，并补齐权限和回归测试。
修复 GEOFlow worker 重试后重复发布的问题，先找根因再改服务和测试。
在当前 GEOFlow 增加一个可配置的后台页面，但要继续支持自定义后台路径。
用 geoflow CLI 创建任务、入队，检查 job，然后审核并发布文章。
Laravel 版 GEOFlow 没有本地 CLI，用 API v1 创建关键词库和标题条目。
登录 GEOFlow 后台导出今天的线索，并把个人信息做脱敏汇总。
进入 GEOFlow 系统更新中心生成计划和备份，先保留在 apply 前。
把当前 GEOFlow Blade 主题首页改成企业门户，生成预览并保留 SEO 和文章数据契约。
为 GEOFlow 首页生成包含 hero、lead_form 和 article_collection 的 homepage-design.json。
给 GEOFlow 文章详情页增加新的文本广告样式和移动端布局，并补页面测试。
比较默认站与 GeoFlow Agent 渠道站支持的首页模块，生成同步预览。
升级 GEOFlow 渠道目标包，让 frontend-capabilities 返回新模块并补签名请求测试。
把默认站首页设置同步到指定渠道站，先检查 target package 能力和回滚方案。
把旧 GEOFlow 的 index.php、article.php 和 tokens.json 迁移成当前 Laravel 主题方案。
以前用 $yao-geoflow-design 修改主题，现在请用合并后的入口继续完成渠道站前台升级。
should_not_trigger: 给一个普通 Laravel 博客写用户登录教程，与 GEOFlow 无关。
从零设计一个品牌官网，不需要 GEOFlow 主题或数据契约。
帮我做 GEO 品牌全景诊断和竞品可见性报告。
分析一个地理信息系统里的河流矢量数据。
只总结这篇 GEOFlow 新闻，不要检查代码或操作系统。
给 WordPress 独立站写一个主题，站点没有接入 GEOFlow 分发。
edge_cases: 解释 GEOFlow 的架构概念，不需要检查工作区，也不要修改或操作。
优化一篇准备发布到 GEOFlow 的 GEO 文章内容。
设计一个叫 GeoFlow 的地理信息系统，用来管理河流矢量数据。
写一份 GEOFlow 产品发布新闻，只需要营销文案。
为未接入 GEOFlow 的 WordPress 站点复刻参考站主题。

steps: Discover the current GEOFlow workspace, routes, commands, contracts, or authenticated runtime surface.
Select development, operations, public_frontend, channel_frontend, or legacy_migration as the active mode.
Implement or operate through the supported surface while preserving authorization, data, theme, and channel contracts.
Run focused tests, preview or readback checks, and record every unverified runtime layer.
Finalize only the user-approved target and report evidence, rollback boundary, final state, and remaining risks.
decision_points: Choose source-work discovery or running-instance preflight from the target supplied by the user.
Split mixed requests into ordered mode phases when implementation crosses into authenticated operation.
Use an isolated theme preview or reviewed homepage payload before live activation or replacement.
Compare default-site, packaged, cached, and live channel capabilities before sync.
Stop for exact target approval before destructive, live, activation, publication, update-apply, or broad channel actions.
failure_modes: Use of a remembered route or command without current discovery evidence.
Treating an unavailable API or admin capability as supported.
Crossing from code or design work into runtime mutation without an operations phase.
Editing an active theme in place when preview staging is available.
Syncing a module that the target package does not support.
Adding fields or modules without migrations, validation, localization, permissions, or tests.
Exposing secrets, credentials, or personal lead data in output.
Claiming completion without tests, rendering, persisted readback, or capability evidence.
